message:
feat(fp-frame): add get_dummies drop_first/dummy_na parity (frankenpandas-1w18)

Adds DataFrame::get_dummies_with_options matching pandas 2.2
pd.get_dummies(columns=..., prefix_sep='_', dummy_na=False,
drop_first=False). prefix_sep customizes the `{col}{sep}{value}`
indicator naming (defaults to '_'). dummy_na appends an `{col}{sep}nan`
indicator marking rows with nulls in the source column. drop_first
removes the first category's indicator per source column to avoid the
dummy-variable trap. Existing get_dummies() now delegates to the new
options path so behavior is unchanged.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
